title: verbascum thapsus var. elongatum
intro: Verbascum thapsus var. elongatum, also known as the elongated mullein, is a perennial herb that belongs to the figwort family. It is widely known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where its leaves and flowers are used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, due to their anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Verbascum thapsus var. elongatum include its ability to soothe irritated mucous membranes, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions and promote overall well-being.
